microsoft_ft: **Owned end-to-end** product development of Azure's internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling features that cut operational toil by 30% and scaled a 2-person workflow into a platformized system.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability, shipping in **4 months** with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation standard across enterprise providers.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ contract, aligning technical and non-technical stakeholders around a single delivery plan.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly expanding the platform's ability to serve more customers without added headcount.

Scaled recovery validation to sustain **45+ annual resilience drills** driving $14M+ in business impact across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp by standardizing cross-functional execution workflows.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows by conducting user demos and training sessions across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and validating the feature's real-world provider value.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the addition of intent-based YAML generation to the next release cycle.

Improved data reliability and retrieval speed by **83%** by migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool and enforcing rigorous metadata standards — reducing friction for end users navigating complex technical content.
microsoft_2022: **Generated $3M** in accelerated revenue and launched Azure regions 28% faster by aligning 140+ cross-functional teams around a unified automation prioritization framework, translating ambiguous operational pain into a clear, actionable roadmap.

Led discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a phased roadmap to automate critical paths — directly improving reliability and reducing risk for downstream provider-facing services.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, giving leadership the data-driven visibility needed to prioritize high-impact automation investments and communicate progress against OKRs.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy for a **2,000+ unit pilot**, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — balancing speed-to-value with rock-solid reliability under tight delivery constraints.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing a backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilize the developer intake process, and keep a cross-functional engineering team moving without unnecessary approvals.

Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering around automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing the manual coordination burden that had been slowing feature delivery across teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals through a new CRM process, improving both speed-to-close and customer experience from first contact through delivery.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile to better align messaging with user pain points and drive faster value realization.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by analyzing **1,000+ project records** to identify and seal margin leaks, delivering a data-driven profitability model that balanced intuition with hard financial evidence.
